Localization.Description: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2023-7028 in Gitlab Community Edition and Enterprise Edition. This vulnerability allows user account password reset emails to be delivered to unverified email addresses.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2023-7028 in Gitlab CE/EE to change the password of user {object.account.name} using unverified email address {datafield3} on host {event_src.host}
